commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then went Samson down, and his father and his mother, to Timnah, and came to the vineyards of Timnah: and, behold, a young lion roared against him. Young lion, not quite so strong as an old one, but in its vigour. (Rabbins) (Calmet) Met him. Hebrew, "roared against him. "(Haydock) His parents were at some distance. (Menochius) St. Augustine (in Psalm lxxxviii. ) shows the application of this history to Christ's establishing and adorning the church of the Gentiles with sweet and wholesome laws.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
